narrative:
Precinct Steubenville 5-3 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 743 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
